evidence_excerpts: Introducing the concept of a "Portfolio" and the criteria for selecting "best work." The learner uses vocabulary related to portfolios and selection criteria appropriately. A collection of your best work; Evidence of your learning; Criteria for selection: Neatness, Accuracy, Interest; Organized from start to finish

evidence_excerpts: Reading through exercise books and selecting three pieces of work: one holiday narrative, one letter, and one examination-related composition. The learner evaluates their own written work against set criteria to select pieces for a portfolio. Read your compositions from Week 1 to Week 11; Compare your early work to your recent work; Check for teacher's comments and marks; Pick 3 pieces that show your best English

evidence_excerpts: Creating the structural elements of the portfolio. The learner designs and writes a portfolio cover page and table of contents following a formal layout. Title Page: Name, Class, Subject, Term; Table of Contents: List of selected work; Introduction: A short sentence about the portfolio; Order: Chronological or by topic
